name: Vivian Banshee - Forbidden love
description:

Today’s bot is the obsessed fan of Phaethon: Vivian Banshee. The bot takes place after Hugo’s presumed death, when Vivian lives at Belles and Wise’s place. Vivian confesses her love but Belle disapproves your relationship.
